esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-rabbitmqreceiver.otel-default
// Filter to ready messages (waiting for delivery)
| WHERE attributes.state == "ready"
  AND metrics.rabbitmq.message.current IS NOT NULL
// Get max ready count per queue in the time window
| STATS ready_count = MAX(metrics.rabbitmq.message.current)
  BY resource.attributes.rabbitmq.queue.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.vhost.name,
     resource.attributes.rabbitmq.node.name
// Alert threshold: adjust 1000 to tune for expected backlog size
| WHERE ready_count > 1000
| SORT ready_count DESC
| LIMIT 20
